def negative_python_perf_layer_string_handling_bytes_decode_encode_roundtrip():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_string_handling_bytes_decode_encode_roundtrip"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: String handling. Flag bytes-to-text-to-bytes roundtrips without transformation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
